subcodes.first_line: O my God! O Thou Remover of adversities and Dispeller of afflictions!  I, verily, implore Thee
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا کاشف البلایاء و دافع الرزایاء انی اتضرع الیک تضرع العانی الی ملیک
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for the departed, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
